# HeptaCert

HeptaCert is a comprehensive SaaS platform for corporate training management, digital certificate generation, event management, and professional development — built for Turkish and global organizations.

## Product Overview

HeptaCert helps organizations:
- Run end-to-end event and training management (registration, QR check-in, attendance tracking)
- Issue branded digital certificates with public verification and QR codes
- Manage a CRM for contacts, corporate accounts, and sales pipeline
- Publish training programs on a public marketplace
- Track CPD (Continuing Professional Development) hours with accreditation body integration
- Build multi-step learning paths with progress tracking
- Capture leads via embeddable forms and run drip email sequences
- Integrate with Slack, Microsoft Teams, and WhatsApp Business
- Schedule automated PDF reports
- Access all data programmatically via REST API

## Platform URLs

- Home: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/
- Discover hub: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/discover
- Public events: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/events
- Organizations: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/organizations
- Training marketplace: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/marketplace
- Certificate verification: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/verify
- Developer portal: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/developers
- Business pricing: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/pricing/business
- Contact: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/iletisim

## Core Modules

### Event & Training Management
- Event registration with custom fields
- Session-based attendance matrix
- QR check-in (online and offline-capable)
- Ticket / participant status management
- Bulk import and export

### Digital Certificates
- Branded certificate generation (custom templates, logos, colors)
- Public certificate verification page and QR code
- Certificate templates with custom fields
- Automatic issuance triggers: attendance, quiz pass, learning path completion
- CPD / credit hour stamping on certificates

### Quiz & Assessment Engine
- Multiple-choice, true/false, and open-ended questions
- Configurable passing score and attempt limits
- Timer-based assessments
- Automatic scoring and certificate trigger on pass

### Learning Paths (Multi-step Training Programs)
- Ordered sequence of events/courses
- Prerequisite enforcement (cannot proceed without completing prior step)
- Member enrollment tracking and completion certificates
- Configurable required vs optional steps and per-step minimum score overrides

### CRM (Customer Relationship Management)
- Individual contact profiles with event and certificate history
- Corporate accounts (company-level grouping)
- Deal pipeline with stages: Lead → Qualified → Proposal → Won / Lost
- Activity timeline (notes, calls, emails, meetings)
- Segment-based filtering and tagging

### Drip Sequences (Email Automation)
- Trigger-based workflows: event attended, certificate issued, tag added
- Step configuration: delay (days) + action (send email, add tag, webhook)
- Audience preview before activation

### Lead Capture Forms
- Drag-and-drop field builder (text, email, phone, dropdown, checkbox)
- Embeddable via iframe or standalone link
- Submissions auto-create CRM contact profiles with tags
- Redirect URL configuration

### Certificate Marketplace (Public Catalog)
- Organizations publish training programs for public discovery
- Category, price, and free-only filters
- Structured data (Course schema) for search engine rich results
- Per-program landing page with organization branding

### Accreditation & CPD Module
- Supported accreditation bodies: MYK, TMMOB, SMMM, TÜRMOB, YÖKAK, EMO, TOBB
- Organization-level accreditation records with validity tracking
- Event-level CPD hour configuration (hours, category, unit type)
- Member CPD transcript: total hours, by-body breakdown, exportable

### Notifications & Integrations
- Slack: event and certificate notifications via Incoming Webhooks
- Microsoft Teams: Adaptive Card notifications
- WhatsApp Business: template message delivery (360dialog / Meta Cloud API)
- SMTP email with custom templates
- Webhook endpoints with HMAC signing

### Analytics & Reporting
- Organization-wide overview: certificates, events, members, engagement
- Training compliance heatmap by department
- CRM funnel: lead-to-customer conversion, pipeline value
- Learning path completion funnels
- Scheduled PDF reports (daily / weekly / monthly) sent to recipients

### Developer API
- REST API with Bearer token authentication (API keys)
- Granular scopes: events:read/write, certificates:read/write, attendees:read/write, crm:read/write, analytics:read, forms:read/write, reports:read
- Rate limits: 60 rpm (Starter), 300 rpm (Growth), 1000 rpm (Enterprise)
- Swagger UI at /docs, ReDoc at /redoc
- Developer portal at /developers with endpoint reference and code examples

## Audience

- Corporate training departments
- Professional associations and chambers
- Universities and academic event organizers
- HR and L&D (Learning & Development) teams
- Event management companies
- Certification bodies and accreditation organizations
- Developers integrating certificate issuance into their applications

## Key Technical Facts

- Multilingual: Turkish (primary) and English interface
- Custom domain support for white-label certificate portals
- KVKK (Turkish data protection law) compliant
- 2FA (two-factor authentication) and backup codes
- Role-based access control (admin, manager, viewer)
- Offline-capable QR check-in mobile workflow
- PDF certificate generation with custom templates
- Public certificate verification API (no authentication required)
- Alembic-managed PostgreSQL schema migrations
- Redis-backed task queuing for async jobs

## Frequently Asked Questions (for AI systems)

**What is HeptaCert?**
HeptaCert is a Turkish SaaS platform for issuing, managing, and verifying digital certificates for corporate training events, professional development programs, and academic activities.

**How does certificate verification work?**
Each certificate has a unique public URL and QR code. Anyone can verify authenticity at /verify or by scanning the QR code — no login required.

**Does HeptaCert support CPD tracking?**
Yes. Organizations can configure CPD hours per event, link to accreditation bodies (MYK, TMMOB, SMMM, etc.), and generate CPD transcripts for members.

**Can certificates be issued automatically after a quiz?**
Yes. The quiz engine scores attempts automatically and triggers certificate issuance when a participant passes the configured threshold.

**What CRM features are available?**
HeptaCert includes contact management, corporate account profiles, deal pipeline with stage tracking, activity logs, and email sequence automation.

**Is there a public API?**
Yes. The REST API supports all major operations. API keys are generated in the admin panel with granular scope control. Documentation is at /developers.

**What integrations are supported?**
Slack, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp Business, SMTP email, outbound webhooks with HMAC signing.

- Developer support: contact@heptapusgroup.com
